name: What's the time limit to report slip and fall at my job in Boise?
description: ID: 60 days max, UT: 180 days—report now to protect your claim.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to report slip and fall at my job in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: ID: 60 days max, UT: 180 days—report now to protect your claim.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report immediately, but Idaho requires notification within 60 days of injury.** Delays can lead to disputes over work-relatedness, risking claim denial.[1] Utah has a 180-day rule for workers' comp, but sooner preserves evidence. Statute for third-party suits is 2 years in ID, 4 in UT.[4][6] Act fast to avoid complications from faded memories or cleaned hazards. Document and consult a lawyer promptly.
